content:
# Ant Design - Overview

Page type: empty_state
Use cases: no data, empty table, empty transfer list, fresh setup
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: https://ant.design/components/empty/

Visual traits:
- minimal
- friendly
- componentized
- neutral

Use when:
- no data
- empty table
- empty transfer list
- fresh setup

Avoid when:
- full onboarding story
- server error
- loading

AI summary: Use Ant Design Empty for concise no-data placeholders in enterprise UI: neutral illustration, clear description, and optional create action for fresh-start states.

# Ant Design - Layout Rules

Page type: empty_state
Use cases: no data, empty table, empty transfer list, fresh setup
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: https://ant.design/components/empty/

- Use a clear empty placeholder when no data is available.
- Include a simple create action when the empty state is a fresh-start opportunity.
- Customize image and description only when it improves clarity.

AI summary: Use Ant Design Empty for concise no-data placeholders in enterprise UI: neutral illustration, clear description, and optional create action for fresh-start states.

# Ant Design - Component Patterns

Page type: empty_state
Use cases: no data, empty table, empty transfer list, fresh setup
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: https://ant.design/components/empty/

- empty illustration
- description
- footer action
- simple image variant
- custom image

AI summary: Use Ant Design Empty for concise no-data placeholders in enterprise UI: neutral illustration, clear description, and optional create action for fresh-start states.

# Ant Design - Interaction States

Page type: empty_state
Use cases: no data, empty table, empty transfer list, fresh setup
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: https://ant.design/components/empty/

- no data
- create now
- empty table
- empty transfer

AI summary: Use Ant Design Empty for concise no-data placeholders in enterprise UI: neutral illustration, clear description, and optional create action for fresh-start states.

# Ant Design - Accessibility Notes

Page type: empty_state
Use cases: no data, empty table, empty transfer list, fresh setup
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: https://ant.design/components/empty/

- Do not make the illustration the only explanation.
- Keep action text explicit and keyboard reachable.

AI summary: Use Ant Design Empty for concise no-data placeholders in enterprise UI: neutral illustration, clear description, and optional create action for fresh-start states.

# Ant Design - Implementation Hints

Page type: empty_state
Use cases: no data, empty table, empty transfer list, fresh setup
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: https://ant.design/components/empty/

- Use for compact enterprise empty states inside tables, lists, or transfer components.
- Pair with creation CTA when the next step is obvious.

AI summary: Use Ant Design Empty for concise no-data placeholders in enterprise UI: neutral illustration, clear description, and optional create action for fresh-start states.
